name: Excessive Global Administrators
description: Identifies when there are more than 5 Global Administrator accounts
query: SELECT COUNT(*) as admin_count FROM entra_role_assignments WHERE role_definition_id = 'global_admin_role_id' HAVING COUNT(*) > 5
remediation: Reduce the number of Global Administrators to 2-5. Use least-privilege roles where possible (e.g., User Administrator, Security Administrator).
